start.title: The Tavern Door
start.text: Rain taps against the windows of the old tavern. Warm light spills across the floor, and every table seems to hide a story. The bartender watches me with the kind of patience that means they already know more than they should.

choices.text: Buy a round for the room

rumors.title: Rumor Mill
rumors.text: A hooded traveler leans close and speaks of a map hidden under the hearthstone. Another swears the cellar door opens only for the honest. The bartender's expression says both stories might be true.

toast.title: A Room Begins to Sing
toast.text: Mugs rise, laughter spreads, and the room's tension melts away. For a moment, the tavern feels less like a stop on the road and more like the center of the world.

hearth.title: Under the Hearthstone
hearth.text: You lift the stone and find a folded note wrapped around a brass key. It reads: 'For the one who asks the right question.' The tavern isn't ordinary at all.

choices.text: Keep the key and walk out

end.title: Another Night, Another Tale
end.text: The rain has slowed. Whatever happens next, the tavern has already changed the shape of the night.
